verdict_reasoning: KLK2 is a classical secreted serine protease synthesized via signal peptide-directed secretory pathway. No transmembrane domain, GPI anchor, or covalent/wash-resistant surface tethering. No documented cell-state-induced ecto-display, tissue-restricted surface pool, lysosomal-exocytosis involvement, PM minority-pool cycling, or stable TM-partner anchoring. Clinically relevant as soluble circulating biomarker, not surface target.
